content:
I'm going back through the main story faithfully to re-experience it now that it's properly translated, and have been proofreading the Event dialog flavor text as I go along.

I understand there's a hold on Gameplay Text right now, so I don't intend to submit the options keys (ChoiceDescX) unless given the OK to do so, but I wanted to ask about some that I've noticed do not have descriptions. For example, at the point the player would be asked to make a decision here, their only options are described only as "Thick Medical Log" and "Thin Medical Log", with no description of what benefit would come from their choice, which only comes on the "Leave" option once a decision has been made.

This tends to be a trend specifically with the Events that are tied directly to the current story, and I was wondering if that was intentional (encourage the player to care about the story first and the gameplay second), or a symptom of EGDS (Early Game Design Syndrome) that may potentially be corrected in the future?
